basic_details.job_title: UPSRLM Amethi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline fo Accountant and MIS Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Uttar Pradesh State Rural Livelihood Mission Amethi (UPSRLM Amethi)
basic_details.short_information: Uttar Pradesh State Rural Livelihood Mission Amethi (UPSRLM Amethi) has published the Accountant & MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt. No. 243/SM/MCLF/ADVERTISEMENT/2025-26. The recruitment drive aims to fill 9 Accountant & MIS Assistant positions. Candidates aged between 21 to 45 years with qualifications including 12th pass with Hindi knowledge, basic arithmetic skills, computer knowledge, and experience in group management and accounting are eligible to apply through offline mode. The application process will remain open until 13 July 2026, and candidates can access the

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th pass with Hindi knowledge and basic arithmetic, computer knowledge, experience in group management and accounting.
qualification.details: Accountant (MCLF) | Women members of Uttar Pradesh Rural Livelihood Mission Member of group, village organization and cluster level union 12th class pass Do you know how to read and write Hindi? Good knowledge of arithmetic Possibility of using Smart Phone/Android Phone Willing to travel to other villages and during bank working hours at the bank branch 3 years experience (in writing books on group, village organization and CLF) | MIS Assistant | Member of Uttar Pradesh Rural Livelihood Mission Women's Group (Priority) 12th class pass Do you know how to read and write Hindi? Good knowledge of arithmetic Possibility of using Smart Phone/Android Phone 6 months computer/software course certificate Ability to operate Microsoft Office and prepare reports on a computer Work experience and training at Resource Block and other places for more than 30 days (on the concept of formation and management of group, village organization and cluster level federation, financial management, books of records, etc.)

selection_process: Cluster level Union Accountant will be selected from among the Cluster level Union Book Keepers having experience of more than 2 years. Other information related to the selection process has been pasted on the notice board.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for UPSRLM Amethi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: NIC website of MCLF, Vikas Khand and District.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: UPSRLM Amethi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the UPSRLM Amethi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download UPSRLM Amethi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Accountant (MCLF) Women members of Uttar Pradesh Rural Livelihood Mission Member of group, village organization and cluster level union 12th class pass Do you know how to read and write Hindi? Good knowledge of arithmetic Possibility of using Smart Phone/Android Phone Willing to travel to other villages and during bank working hours at the bank branch 3 years experience (in writing books on group, village organization and CLF) MIS Assistant Member of Uttar Pradesh Rural Livelihood Mission Women's Group (Priority) 12th class pass Do you know how to read and write Hindi? Good knowledge of arithmetic Possibility of using Smart Phone/Android Phone 6 months computer/software course certificate Ability to operate Microsoft Office and prepare reports on a computer Work experience and training at Resource Block and other places for more than 30 days (on the concept of formation and management of group, village organization and cluster level federation, financial management, books of records, etc.)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Cluster level Union Accountant will be selected from among the Cluster level Union Book Keepers having experience of more than 2 years. Other information related to the selection process has been pasted on the notice board.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for UPSRLM Amethi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: NIC website of MCLF, Vikas Khand and District. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 13-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for UPSRLM Amethi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the UPSRLM Amethi Recruitment 2026 is 13th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant and MIS Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies, with 5 for Accountant (MCLF) and 4 for MIS Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for both Accountant and MIS Assistant posts is 21 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both Accountant and MIS Assistant positions is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to submit their applications via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the minimum qualification required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: For the Accountant post, candidates must have passed the 12th class, possess knowledge of Hindi, basic arithmetic, and computer skills, along with 3 years of experience in bookkeeping.

faq.question: Q7. What are the eligibility criteria for the MIS Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the MIS Assistant post, candidates need to be 12th pass, know Hindi, have basic arithmetic and computer knowledge, a 6-month computer course certificate, and experience in group management and financial record keeping.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any salary information provided in the notification?
faq.answer: The salary details are not specified in the provided data for these posts.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the NIC website of MCLF, Vikas Khand, and District.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based.
